goal: Create a Python script scripts/task-stats.py that reads .claude-flow/kanban.json and prints a one-line summary: total tasks, done, failed, pending, total cost. Use argparse with --json flag for JSON output. Include tests in tests/test_task_stats.py.

tree.description: Read existing kanban.json to understand its schema and structure
Read existing tests and scripts to understand project patterns (imports, argparse style, test structure)
Create scripts/task-stats.py with argparse, kanban parsing, and summary output (text and --json modes)

children.description: Create scripts/task-stats.py with argparse CLI skeleton and standard entry point
Implement kanban.json file loading with fail-fast error handling
Implement status counting and cost aggregation logic
Implement text and JSON output modes
Write unit tests for task-stats.py covering all paths
Read existing test files and task-stats.py to understand import patterns and fixture conventions used in the project
Create test file scaffold with importlib import, helper to write kanban.json fixtures, and sys.argv save/restore context
Write tests for valid text output and valid JSON output paths through main()
Write tests for error paths: missing kanban file (non-zero exit + stderr message) and malformed JSON file
Write tests for edge cases: missing/null cost handling, empty tree/summary, and case-insensitive status counting via extract_stats
Run full pytest suite and fix any failures to achieve 100% pass rate

tree.description: Create tests/test_task_stats.py with unit tests covering normal, empty, --json, and missing-file cases

children.description: Read scripts/task-stats.py and existing kanban.json to understand the module's API, output format, and schema
Create tests/test_task_stats.py with importlib-based module import, helper to write kanban.json fixtures, and TestDefaultOutput class
Create tests/test_task_stats.py with importlib-based module import, helper to write kanban.json fixtures, and TestDefaultOutput class
Add TestJsonOutput class validating --json flag produces parseable JSON with correct keys and values
Add TestMissingKanban class verifying non-zero exit and stderr error message when kanban.json is absent
Add TestEmptyTree class for zero-count kanban with empty tree array and TestMixedStatuses class for varied task statuses
Run full pytest suite on tests/test_task_stats.py and fix any failures

tree.description: Run full test suite and commit all changes to master (do NOT push due to prior push failures)
